fields.name: Item No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the item number of the item on the card.

fields.name: Language Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the language that is used when translating specified text on documents to foreign business partner, such as an item description on an order confirmation.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the item description to use when this language code is selected.

fields.name: Description 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies more information about the item.

fields.name: Variant Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the variant of the item on the line.
